meta.siteTitle: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving | Cessnock & Hunter Valley
meta.description: Family-owned earthmoving specialists servicing Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter for over 30 years. Wet hire, excavation, land clearing, roads and dams.

business.name: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
business.description: Family-owned and operated earthmoving specialists servicing the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. Wet hire available across our full fleet for agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential projects.

hero.headline: Hunter Valley's Earthmoving Experts
hero.subheadline: Family-owned for over 30 years. The right machine, the right operator, for every job — from residential blocks to major civil and mining works.

services.headline: What We Do
services.subheadline: A full range of earthmoving services across residential, commercial, agricultural and mining projects throughout the Hunter region.

items.title: Earthmoving & Rehabilitation
items.description: Expert bulk earthmoving and site rehabilitation across all project types. From initial cut and fill to final grading, we leave sites ready for the next stage.

page.heroSub: Professional bulk earthmoving and site rehabilitation throughout the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been moving earth across the Hunter Valley for over 30 years. Our experienced operators and extensive fleet handle everything from initial bulk excavation through to final grading and full site rehabilitation — ensuring your project is set up for success from the ground up.

highlights.text: Available Monday to Friday, all year round

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: We visit your site to understand the scope and select the right machinery for the job.

steps.title: Quote
steps.description: Clear contract or hourly rates provided before any work begins.

steps.title: Mobilise & Execute
steps.description: The right machine and operator on site, working efficiently and safely.

steps.title: Completion
steps.description: Site left clean, graded, and ready for your next trade or contractor.

items.question: Do you offer contract or hourly rates?
items.answer: Both — we can work on a contract basis for defined scopes or hourly for more flexible requirements.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: We primarily service Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter region. Contact us for jobs outside this area.

items.question: Which machines are available for earthmoving?
items.answer: We can deploy excavators (4.5t, 13t, 20t), dozers, graders, and more depending on the scope.

items.question: How far in advance do I need to book?
items.answer: It varies by season. Contact us as early as possible to secure your preferred dates.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Contact us for a free quote on your earthmoving project.

items.title: Roads & Dams Construction
items.description: Experienced in the construction and maintenance of rural roads and water storage dams. Built to last in the tough Hunter Valley conditions.

page.heroSub: Durable rural roads and reliable water storage dams — built right the first time.
page.intro: From farm access tracks to major rural roads, and from small stock dams to large water storage facilities, Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has the machinery and experience to deliver. We understand the demands of the Hunter Valley landscape and build infrastructure that lasts.

steps.title: Site Inspection
steps.description: We assess terrain, drainage, and access requirements before quoting.

steps.title: Quote & Planning
steps.description: Detailed quote covering materials, machinery, and timeline.

steps.title: Construction
steps.description: Experienced operators execute the build with the right equipment.

steps.title: Final Grade & Handover
steps.description: Finishing grader pass and site walkthrough to ensure you're satisfied.

items.question: Can you build dams on private agricultural land?
items.answer: Yes — dam construction for stock water and irrigation is one of our core services for rural properties.

items.question: What machinery do you use for road construction?
items.answer: Typically our grader, dozers, and tippers for road construction. We match machinery to the specific job.

items.question: Do you handle drainage as part of road works?
items.answer: Yes — proper drainage design and culvert installation is included as part of our road construction service.

items.question: Can you maintain existing roads as well as build new ones?
items.answer: Absolutely — grader maintenance of existing rural roads is a common service we provide.

cta.headline: Need a Road or Dam Built?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free on-site assessment and quote.

items.title: Site Filling & Excavation
items.description: Residential, commercial and industrial site preparation done properly. We excavate, fill and prepare your site so construction can proceed on schedule.

page.heroSub: Professional site preparation for residential, commercial and industrial projects across the Hunter.
page.intro: A properly prepared site is the foundation of any successful build. Mitchell Bros Earthmoving handles all aspects of site excavation and filling — ensuring correct levels, compaction, and drainage before your builder or concretor arrives.

steps.title: Review Plans
steps.description: We review your engineering and building plans to understand exact requirements.

steps.title: Quote
steps.description: Fixed quote based on scope — no surprises.

steps.title: Excavate & Fill
steps.description: Right machinery deployed to excavate, remove spoil, or import and compact fill.

steps.title: Ready for Builder
steps.description: Site handed over at correct levels, compacted, and ready for your next contractor.

items.question: Do you cart away the excavated material?
items.answer: Yes — we have tippers and semi-tippers to remove spoil from site as part of the job.

items.question: Can you import fill material if needed?
items.answer: Yes — we can source and import select fill and compact it to the required standard.

items.question: Which excavator sizes do you have?
items.answer: We run 4.5 tonne, 13 tonne and 20 tonne excavators to suit jobs of all sizes.

items.question: Do you work on domestic house sites?
items.answer: Yes — house site excavations are a regular part of our work alongside larger commercial and industrial jobs.

cta.headline: Ready to Prepare Your Site?
cta.subheadline: Contact us for a fast, obligation-free quote.

items.title: Land Clearing
items.description: Efficient land clearing for development, agriculture and fire mitigation. Our dozer, skid steer and stick rake make fast work of even the heaviest scrub.

page.heroSub: Fast, thorough land clearing for development, agriculture and fire mitigation across the Hunter region.
page.intro: Whether you're opening up new agricultural land, preparing a development site, or creating firebreaks, Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has the right equipment to get the job done efficiently. Our dozer, wheeled skid steer, and stick rake attachments handle everything from light scrub to dense vegetation.

steps.title: Site Visit & Assessment
steps.description: We assess vegetation density, access, and any clearing restrictions before quoting.

steps.title: Quote
steps.description: Clear hourly or contract rate for the scope of clearing required.

steps.title: Clear & Rake
steps.description: Efficient clearing using dozer and stick rake, leaving a clean, workable surface.

steps.title: Disposal or Windrow
steps.description: Material pushed to windrows, mulched, or removed as agreed.

items.question: Do I need council approval to clear land?
items.answer: It depends on your zone and the vegetation involved. We recommend checking with your local council before we start.

items.question: What machinery do you use for clearing?
items.answer: Primarily our D6 dozer and wheeled skid steer bobcat with stick rake and broom attachments, depending on vegetation type.

items.question: Can you clear and leave the land ready for cultivation?
items.answer: Yes — we can stick rake and grade the cleared area to leave it ready for seeding or further development.

items.question: Do you handle large rural clearing jobs?
items.answer: Yes — rural land clearing for agricultural purposes is a core part of our business in the Upper Hunter.

cta.headline: Need Land Cleared?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free on-site quote.

items.title: Erosion Control & Silt Fencing
items.description: Protect your site and neighbouring properties from erosion and sediment run-off. We install and maintain compliant erosion control measures for all project types.

page.heroSub: Compliant, effective erosion and sediment control for construction and development sites across the Hunter.
page.intro: Uncontrolled erosion damages neighbouring properties, waterways, and your project. Mitchell Bros Earthmoving installs effective silt fencing, sediment controls, and erosion management earthworks to keep your site compliant and your neighbours happy.

steps.title: Site Review
steps.description: We assess drainage paths and risk areas on your site.

steps.title: Plan & Quote
steps.description: Erosion and sediment control plan to suit your site and project stage.

steps.title: Install
steps.description: Silt fencing, sediment basins, and earthworks installed efficiently.

steps.title: Ongoing Maintenance
steps.description: Controls maintained and adjusted as your project progresses.

items.question: Is erosion control required on all development sites?
items.answer: Most development approvals require an Erosion and Sediment Control Plan (ESCP). We can help you meet these requirements.

items.question: Do you maintain the silt fencing throughout the project?
items.answer: Yes — we offer ongoing maintenance visits to inspect and repair erosion controls as the project progresses.

items.question: What size sites do you handle erosion control for?
items.answer: From small residential lots to large commercial and mining sites — we scale our approach to suit.

items.question: Can you retrofit erosion controls on an existing site?
items.answer: Yes — if your current controls are insufficient, we can assess and upgrade them quickly.

cta.headline: Need Erosion Control on Your Site?
cta.subheadline: Contact us for a fast, practical solution.

items.title: Wet Hire — Full Fleet
items.description: Hire any machine from our extensive fleet with an experienced operator included. Contract and hourly rates available Monday to Friday, all year round.

page.heroSub: The right machine with an experienced operator, available Monday to Friday across the Hunter region.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving offers wet hire on our complete machinery fleet — meaning you get the machine and an experienced, professional operator. Available for contract or hourly engagement, Monday to Friday all year round. Whatever the job requires, we have the equipment to handle it.

highlights.text: Wheeled Skid Steer Bobcat & Low Loader

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Describe your job and we'll recommend the right machine and operator.

steps.title: Get a Rate

steps.title: We Turn Up

items.question: What is wet hire?
items.answer: Wet hire means the machinery comes with one of our experienced operators included — you don't need your own licence or operator.

items.question: Do you offer contract rates or hourly only?
items.answer: Both — we can work on an hourly rate or a fixed contract rate depending on what suits your project.

items.question: What days and hours are you available?
items.answer: Monday to Friday, all year round. Contact us to discuss specific scheduling.

items.question: Can I hire just a single machine for a short job?
items.answer: Yes — contact us with the details and we'll advise on minimum hire periods and availability.

about.headline: About Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
about.body:
We're a family owned and operated business that's been part of the Hunter Valley community for over 30 years. From our base in Cessnock, we service the full range of industries — agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential — across the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions.

Our operators and fleet are available Monday to Friday all year round on both contract and hourly rates. When you deal with MBE, you're dealing with a professional team that knows the local land and gets the job done right.

highlights.text: Family owned and operated for over 30 years
Experienced operators across a full fleet

aboutPage.heroSub: 30+ years of family-owned earthmoving in the Hunter Valley. Local knowledge, professional results.

mission.headline: Our Commitment
mission.text: To deliver professional, reliable earthmoving services that make every project easier for our clients. With the right machine, an experienced operator, and a team that shows up when they say they will — we keep Hunter Valley projects moving.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving is a family owned and operated business that has been servicing the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. What started as a local operation has grown into one of the region's most trusted earthmoving contractors — known for reliability, experience, and a fleet that can handle anything.

We work across agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential sectors. Whether it's building a dam on a rural property, preparing a commercial development site, or providing a grader for road maintenance, our team brings the same professionalism to every job.

Our operators are available Monday to Friday, all year round. We offer both contract and hourly rates to suit the way our clients work. When you call MBE, you're talking to people who know the Hunter Valley — and who'll give you a straight answer.

items.title: Local Commitment
items.description: We're part of this community. We look after our clients and take pride in the work we do in our own backyard.

items.title: The Right Machine
items.description: Our extensive fleet means we always have the right equipment for the job — not a workaround.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: We show up when we say we will. Projects depend on it, and our clients can count on us.

items.title: Experience
items.description: Over 30 years in the field means our operators have seen it all — and know how to handle it.
